# StealthEye Cloud

> No-local ChatGPT-native GitHub/browser execution-body agent.

## Start

- Instructions: `AGENTS.md`
- Active state: `STEALTHEYE_ACTIVE.md`
- Decisions: `STEALTHEYE_DECISIONS.md`
- Handoff: `STEALTHEYE_RELAY.md` and `STEALTHEYE_RELAY.json`
- Latest checkpoint: `STEALTHEYE_SEAL.json`
- Next action: `NEXT_ACTION.md`
- Repo map: `AGENT_REPO_MAP.md`

## Specs

- Final technical spec: `docs/StealthEye_Cloud_Final_Technical_Specification.md`
- Status addendum: `docs/TECHNICAL_SPEC_STATUS_ADDENDUM.md`
- Build plan: `docs/StealthEye_Cloud_Build_Plan.md`
- S9 spec: `docs/S9_ONE_DROP_BUILD_ACCELERATOR.md`
- S10 spec: `docs/S10_ASSISTANT_OPTIMIZATION_LAYER.md`
- S11 plan: `docs/S11_ONE_ACCEPT_MISSION_EXECUTOR.md`

## Current phase

S0–S10 are merged. S10 — Assistant Optimization Layer is complete.

S11 — One-Accept Mission Executor is selected.

## Important caveat

S10 PR #19 was green before merge. A direct post-merge truth commit was made afterward at `7e500a4cb52eca01f9ebc2708d62e6ea70a74ee2`. That direct post-merge truth commit did not spawn a fresh Actions run through the connector and is not separately CI-verified.

## S11 implementation branch

```text
build/s11-one-accept-mission-executor
```

## S11 goal

Build a real GitHub-native mission executor so one approved mission lease can complete routine repo/build/proof/repair/merge work without repeated operator confirmations.

## Planning rule

Future phase planning uses one planning document maximum unless the user explicitly asks for more. No prompt docs unless explicitly requested.

## Do not use

Do not create or rely on `CLAUDE.md`, `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, `.cursorrules`, `soul.md`, generic `MEMORY.md`, or generic `rules.md`.
